title: Model Provider Integration
description: Agent SDK abstracts LLM provider invocation behind Model/ModelProvider interfaces. Supports OpenAI (Chat Completions & Responses API), LiteLLM, and AnyLLM as pluggable backends. MultiProvider routes model names by prefix.

actors.name: AgentRunner
actors.description: SDK internal runner that invokes the model on each agent loop turn

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Configures providers, model settings, and custom clients

actors.name: OpenAI_API
actors.description: OpenAI Chat Completions or Responses API endpoint

actors.name: LiteLLM_Proxy
actors.description: LiteLLM proxy supporting 100+ LLMs via unified OpenAI-compatible interface

use_cases.name: Configure Model Settings
use_cases.description: Set temperature, top_p, frequency_penalty, presence_penalty, max_tokens, tool_choice, parallel_tool_calls, reasoning effort, metadata, store, etc. via ModelSettings dataclass

use_cases.name: Select Provider by Model Name
use_cases.description: MultiProvider parses model string prefix (e.g. 'openai/', 'litellm/', 'any-llm/') to route to the appropriate ModelProvider. No prefix → OpenAIProvider. Unknown prefix modes: 'error' or 'model_id' pass-through.

use_cases.name: Get Non-Streaming Completion
use_cases.description: Call Model.get_response(system_instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, tracing) → ModelResponse. OpenAIChatCompletionsModel internally calls AsyncOpenAI.chat.completions.create(stream=False), converts ChatCompletion to ModelResponse with Usage.

use_cases.name: Stream LLM Response
use_cases.description: Call Model.stream_response(...) → AsyncIterator[TResponseStreamEvent]. OpenAIChatCompletionsModel calls AsyncOpenAI.chat.completions.create(stream=True) then delegates to ChatCmplStreamHandler.handle_stream() to yield OpenAI Responses API-compatible events.

use_cases.name: Translate Chat Completion Chunks to Responses API Format
use_cases.description: ChatCmplStreamHandler.handle_stream(response, stream, model) converts AsyncStream[ChatCompletionChunk] to TResponseStreamEvent sequence: ResponseCreatedEvent → ResponseOutputItemAddedEvent → ResponseTextDeltaEvent / ResponseFunctionCallArgumentsDeltaEvent → ResponseOutputItemDoneEvent → ResponseCompletedEvent

use_cases.name: Handle Reasoning/Thinking Blocks
use_cases.description: ChatCmplStreamHandler detects delta.reasoning_content (OpenAI o-series) or delta.reasoning (3rd-party) or delta.thinking_blocks (Anthropic) and emits ResponseReasoningSummaryTextDeltaEvent / ResponseReasoningTextDeltaEvent. Anthropic thinking signatures stored in encrypted_content.

use_cases.name: Stream Tool Call Arguments
use_cases.description: ChatCmplStreamHandler accumulates delta.tool_calls per index, emits ResponseOutputItemAddedEvent + ResponseFunctionCallArgumentsDeltaEvent incrementally once call_id and name are known, then ResponseOutputItemDoneEvent on completion.

use_cases.name: Use OpenAI Responses API (HTTP or WebSocket)
use_cases.description: OpenAIProvider.get_model() returns OpenAIResponsesModel (HTTP) or OpenAIResponsesWSModel (persistent WebSocket) based on use_responses + responses_transport flags. WebSocket models are cached per event loop for connection reuse.

use_cases.name: Integrate Third-Party LLM via LiteLLM
use_cases.description: Use 'litellm/<model>' prefix to route to LitellmProvider → LitellmModel(Model). LitellmModel.get_response() / stream_response() calls litellm.acompletion() and uses ChatCmplStreamHandler for streaming.

use_cases.name: Integrate Third-Party LLM via AnyLLM
use_cases.description: Use 'any-llm/<model>' prefix to route to AnyLLMProvider → AnyLLMModel(Model). Uses any_llm library for completions.

use_cases.name: Retry Failed Model Requests
use_cases.description: Model.get_retry_advice(ModelRetryAdviceRequest) returns ModelRetryAdvice with backoff settings and replay_safe flag. OpenAIChatCompletionsModel delegates to get_openai_retry_advice() for OpenAI-specific guidance.

use_cases.name: Register Custom Provider Mapping
use_cases.description: Developer can supply a MultiProviderMap with custom prefix→ModelProvider mappings, or set openai_prefix_mode='model_id' / unknown_prefix_mode='model_id' to forward namespaced IDs to OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

use_cases.name: Close Provider Resources
use_cases.description: MultiProvider.aclose() and OpenAIProvider.aclose() release cached WebSocket connections per event loop. OpenAIResponsesWSModel._force_drop_websocket_connection_sync() for closed loops.

key_relationships: MultiProvider extends ModelProvider; delegates to OpenAIProvider, LitellmProvider, AnyLLMProvider by prefix
OpenAIProvider extends ModelProvider; returns OpenAIChatCompletionsModel OR OpenAIResponsesModel OR OpenAIResponsesWSModel
OpenAIChatCompletionsModel extends Model; uses AsyncOpenAI client + ChatCmplStreamHandler
LitellmModel extends Model; uses ChatCmplStreamHandler for streaming
ChatCmplStreamHandler is a utility class (classmethod handle_stream) used by OpenAIChatCompletionsModel and LitellmModel
ModelSettings is passed to every Model.get_response() and stream_response() call
ModelResponse is returned by get_response(); TResponseStreamEvent async-iterated by stream_response()

Model_ABC.get_response: async (system_instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, tracing, *, previous_response_id, conversation_id, prompt) -> ModelResponse

important_notes: OpenAIProvider lazy-loads AsyncOpenAI client to avoid API key requirement at import
ChatCmplStreamHandler normalizes output from OpenAI, LiteLLM, Gemini, Anthropic into the Responses API event format
Anthropic thinking blocks: delta.thinking_blocks → stored as thinking_text + thinking_signature (encrypted_content)
Gemini: tool_call IDs cleaned of '__thought__' suffix; thought_signature from provider_specific_fields
ModelSettings supports extra_headers, extra_body, extra_query, extra_args for provider-specific pass-through
use_responses flag switches between Chat Completions API (default off) and Responses API
WebSocket transport reuses connections per event loop via weakref cache
